title: Liar Game Anime to Air for 6 Months Without Breaks
content: Image courtesy of REMOW©Kaitani Shinobu Products/Shueisha, LIAR GAME CommitteeThe television anime of Shinobu Kaitani's Liar Game manga will run for two consecutive cours (quarters of a year) or six months without breaks.
author: ANN

title: Dr. Stone: Science Future Anime Previews Final Part's 1st Episode in Trailer
content: The staff for the third and final cours (quarter of a year) of Dr. Stone: Science Future, the fourth and final season of the Dr. Stone anime series, revealed a trailer on Sunday that previews the first episode (25th overall episode for the anime) titled "Future Engine." Image via Dr.
author: ANN

title: Fate/Strange Fake Anime Teases 'To Be Continued' in Video
content: Aniplex began streaming a video on Saturday for the Fate/strange Fake television anime that aired after the anime's 13th episode. The video ends with a "To be continued" message. Image via Fate/strange Fake anime's X/Twitter account©成田良悟・TYPE-MOON/KADOKAWA/FSFPCThe anime debuted on January 3 at 11:30 p.m.
author: ANN

title: I Left My A-Rank Party Anime Spawns Game
content: The official website for the television anime of Kōsuke Unagi's I Left My A-Rank Party to Help My Former Students Reach the Dungeon Depths! (A-Rank Party o Ridatsu Shita Ore wa, Moto Oshiego-tachi to Meikyū Shinbu o Mezasu.) light novel series announced on Sunday that the anime is inspiring a game.
author: ANN

title: Rakuen Tsuihō -Expelled from Paradise- Kokoro no Resonance Film's 4th Teaser Previews New Threat
content: The AnimeJapan 2026 stage panel for Rakuen Tsuihō -Expelled from Paradise- Kokoro no Resonance (Heart's Resonance), the all-new feature-length anime film sequel to the Expelled from Paradise film, debuted the new film's fourth teaser trailer and fourth key visual on Sunday.
author: ANN

title: Tokyo Revengers: War of the Three Titans Arc's 2nd Trailer Unveils 4 New Cast Members, October Debut
content: Pony Canyon's stage presentation at the AnimeJapan 2026 event on Sunday revealed the second trailer, additional cast members, and October debut for Tokyo Revengers: War of the Three Titans Arc (Tokyo Revengers: Santen Sensō-hen), the latest arc of the Tokyo Revengers anime.
author: ANN

title: '"Kimi wo Aisuru Ki wa Nai" to Itta Jiki Koushaku-sama ga Nazeka Dekiai shitekimasu' Reveals Additional Cast Pair
content: The "Kimi wo Aisuru Ki wa Nai" to Itta Jiki Koushaku-sama ga Nazeka Dekiai shitekimasu ( The Duke's Son Claims He Won't Love Me yet Showers Me with Adoration ) AnimeJapan 2026 special stage at the DMM TV booth revealed an additional cast pair on Sunday.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Tougen Anki: Nikko Kegon Falls Arc Anime Reveals October 2026 Premiere, New Cast Members
content: The staff of the Tougen Anki: Nikko Kegon Falls Arc television anime based on Yura Urushibara's Tougen Anki: Dark Demon of Paradise manga revealed its October 2026 premiere date and two new cast members on Sunday.
author: ANN

title: Kadokawa Reveals Made in Abyss: Mezameru Shinpi Anime Film's October 23 Opening
content: Kadokawa's stage presentation at the AnimeJapan 2026 event on Sunday revealed the key visual and October 23 premiere for Made in Abyss: Mezameru Shinpi (Made in Abyss: Awakening Mystery), the first film in the new Made in Abyss anime film trilogy.
author: ANN

title: 'Iwamoto-senpai no Suisen' Unveils Additional Cast, Second Promo for Summer 2026
content: The Iwamoto-senpai no Suisen ( Recommendation from Mr. Iwamoto ) AnimeJapan 2026 stage event at the Hakuhodo DY Music & Pictures booth unveiled additional cast, a second promo, and new visual (pictured above) on Sunday. The anime series adapting Hiroshi Shiibashi 's seinen military manga will premiere in July 2026.
author: MyAnimeList
